name: electron-download-runtime
title: Electron download runtime and sidecars
description: Replace the Rust-managed downloader, ffmpeg, yt-dlp, and sidecar orchestration with Node/Electron services while preserving current progress, cancellation, and output semantics.
creator: Mabel-WIN
notes: Default direction is full Node/Electron ownership. Keep the current user-visible download queue, progress, retry, and file-output behavior stable unless an explicit follow-up task changes product behavior.
